channel.title: Now on Western Wilson
channel.description: Recent content in Now on Western Wilson

item.title: Now
item.description:
I’m in the Balkans and you can feel the summer heat already, daily temps over 30℃. Thankfully I love the sun, the mornings are cool enough, and the nights are still pleasant to roam around.

What I’m doing

I’m continuing to do all the things I enjoy: coding, learning, reading, exercising, cooking, and exploring. I use pomodoro timers to gamify my days between job searching, coding, and learning.

Career move

I’m actively looking for my next DevOps, Platform, or Infra Engineer role with the goal to land one in the Netherlands!
